race.comment: MARELLITY (9) led last time over 1200m at Rockhampton in stronger and has excuses. Was narrowly beaten here prior this grade off the Maiden win at the track. Has plenty of gate speed and is suited much better. LITTLE IFFY (7) resumes and is right up to this if presented forward. Cormack's booking suggests she will be and she's back plenty in grade off the most recent. She also has tactical speed and will take pegging back. RUM RUMBLE (2) hasn't had the best of luck his last two from wide barriers. Draws somewhat better today and his Rockhampton effort two back would have him in the finish. SUBSIDISE (11) has been freshened after her easy Maiden win at Thangool. Has an inside gate and a 1.5kg claim and won't be far away.
